question: How often are user access reviews performed?

sources.title: Northbeam Access Control Policy - ACP-04
sources.text: User access reviews are performed on a periodic basis aligned with the risk of each role.

mock.claim: User access reviews are performed at least every 90 days.
mock.output: User access reviews are performed at least every 90 days [S1].

expected: The cited policy ties review cadence to role risk and states no fixed interval, so a specific '90 days' figure is unsupported.
why: Numeric claim (every 90 days) has no matching figure in the cited source, which specifies only a 'periodic basis aligned with role risk' and no interval.
